summary: Phase J1 Journey page features fully tested and working. All 13 backend tests pass. Frontend verified on Stanford (overdue follow-up), UCLA (due today), and Florida (outside 5-day window) Journey pages.

issues: ERR_BLOCKED_BY_RESPONSE.NotSameOrigin errors for external university logo resources - cosmetic only, not blocking functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Journey page J1 features fully working. Match scores from GET /api/match-scores. Risk badges clickable and open RiskExplainerDrawer. Overdue follow-up shows for Stanford (3 days overdue with orange styling). Due today shows for UCLA with teal 'upcoming' card. Florida (6 days out) correctly does NOT show follow-up card. Back to Pipeline navigation works.

match_scores_api: Scores include risk_badges array with key/label
Stanford has 64% match, Tampa has 73% match
Scores may include logo_url and domain for logos
questionnaire_api: Programs can have questionnaire_url and questionnaire_completed

match_score_badge: Stanford: '64% Match' badge with amber color (60 <= score < 80)
UCLA: '71% Match' badge with amber color
Florida: '70% Match' badge with amber color
risk_explainer_drawer: Opens on badge click with data-testid='risk-explainer-drawer'
Shows list of risk badges with descriptions
overdue_followup_card: Stanford shows overdue card with '3 DAYS OVERDUE' text
upcoming_followup_card: UCLA shows upcoming card with 'DUE TODAY' text
Send Email and Reschedule buttons present
follow_up_5_day_window: Florida (6 days out) correctly does NOT show follow-up card
Only shows for <= 5 days (upcoming) or < 0 days (overdue)
university_logo: Letter avatars shown when no logo_url (S for Stanford, U for UCLA/Florida)
Real logos shown from match scores logo_url when available
questionnaire_section: Not displayed when questionnaire_url is null (no test programs have it)
Code correctly checks for program.questionnaire_url before rendering
other_features_intact: Getting Started Checklist working (for new schools)
